content:
Free · No login · Instant PDF Download free printable graph paper as a clean, print-ready PDF — from 5 mm and 1/4 inch grids to 1 cm squares — or make your own custom graph paper in the browser. Beyond classic square grids you'll also find dot grid, isometric, hexagon, lined and Cornell notes paper, every sheet true to scale.
Popular graph paper templates
The grids people print most — one click to a ready PDF.

All templates →

Make and print your graph paper in 3 steps
No sign-up, no watermark, no waiting on a server. Pick a graph paper template or build your own, preview it live, and download a print-ready PDF straight from your browser.

• 1
Pick or customise
Start from a ready-made graph paper template or set your own paper type, spacing, colour and margins.

• 2
Preview live
See an exact, true-to-scale preview update as you change settings — what you see is what prints.

• 3
Download & print
Export a clean PDF (or PNG), then print at 100% scale for accurate grids every time.

Every graph paper template generates across the full ISO A/B/C series and US/Imperial sizes.

Graph paper: questions & answers
What is graph paper? Graph paper — also called grid paper or squared paper — is paper printed with an even grid of squares that helps you draw to scale, plot data and keep work neat. FreeGraphPaper turns any grid into a clean, print-ready PDF.
Is the printable graph paper free? Yes. Every graph paper PDF here is completely free — no login, no sign-up and no watermark. Download as many sheets as you like.
How do I print graph paper at the right size? Download the PDF and print at 100% scale (turn off “fit to page”) so a 5 mm or 1/4 inch grid measures exactly right on paper.
What graph paper sizes and spacings can I download? Popular options include 5 mm, 1 cm, 1/8 inch and 1/4 inch graph paper on A4, US Letter and the full ISO A/B/C range — plus dot grid, isometric, hexagon and lined paper.
